articles.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
articles.summary: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.
articles.meta_description: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic

articles.title: Cellebrite said it cut off Russia, but Russia used is tools anyway
articles.summary: Security researchers found evidence that Russian authorities hacked the iPhone of a political opponent using a phone-unlocking device made by Cellebrite, even after the company said it would stop selling to Putin’s government.
articles.meta_description: Cellebrite said it cut off Russia, but Russia used is tools anyway

articles.title: OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M
articles.summary:
Gray Swan, an AI security startup that helps frontier labs “red-team” their latest models, raises USD 40m Series A round of funding.
The post OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M  appeared first on Slator.
articles.meta_description: OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M

articles.title: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor who had worked in DRC
articles.summary:
French health ministry says patient’s contacts are being traced and that risk to European public is very low
The first case of Ebola has been confirmed in France, the country’s health ministry has said, in a doctor who had returned from a humanitarian mission to an area affected by the outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.
The patient was transferred to a specialist facility and was in
articles.meta_description: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor who had worked in DRC

articles.title: Fact check: No, Zelenskyy wasn't killed in a Russian airstrike
articles.summary: Amid a flare-up in violence between Russia and Ukraine, viral posts claim Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has died. DW Fact check takes a closer look.
articles.meta_description: Fact check: No, Zelenskyy wasn't killed in a Russian airstrike
